caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey-white peaked hairstyle wears glasses, black headphones, a white button-down shirt, white suspenders, and a red bow tie. He is seated in a recording studio, speaking into a grey microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a yellow garment with "LEE" written on it. On-screen logos and text appear in the lower-left and lower-right areas of the scene, including a logo that reads "PODCAST" and text that says "LOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and mouth. He appears to be mid-sentence, with his expression shifting slightly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
